reports.name: Wintergetal per jaar
reports.query:
SELECT
    L1.station,
    L1.winter,
    SUM(L1.wintergetal) AS wintergetal
FROM (
    SELECT
        eg.STATION          AS station,
        CASE
            WHEN eg.MAAND >= 11 THEN eg.JAAR + 1
            WHEN eg.MAAND <= 3  THEN eg.JAAR
            ELSE 0
        END                 AS winter,
        -eg.TG              AS wintergetal
    FROM etmgeg eg
    WHERE eg.TG < 0
    <#SELECTIONS>
) L1
WHERE L1.winter <> 0
GROUP BY L1.station, L1.winter
ORDER BY L1.winter
